{{Chess Opening Theory/Position|Snyder Variation}} =Snyder Variation= This opening is an interesting variation of the Sicilian. The idea is to fianchetto the dark-squared bishop on b2. The main continuation is [[/2...Nc6/]] although many moves are possible. ==Theory table== {{Chess Opening Theory/Table}}. 1.e4 c5 2.b3
